name: Bite-Size Pepperoni Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the muffins in half and toast them in the toaster.
2. Spread the pizza sauce on both halves of the muffins.
3. Top with the onions.
4. Cut each muffin half into four pieces.
5. Place the eight muffin pieces in a circle around the edge of a paper plate (four plates will be used).
6. Lay one-quarter section of the green pepper on top of each muffin piece.
7. Place one-half slice of the pepperoni on top of each muffin piece.
8. Top evenly with the mozzarella cheese.
9. Place each plate, uncovered, in the microwave, and cook on HIGH for 1 minute; rotate each plate one-half turn after 30 seconds.
Yield: 32 servings
One Serving: Calories: 45 Carbohydrates: 3 Exchange: 1/4 bread; 1/3 medium-fat meat
